_description: Fuel cost comparison inputs — standalone calculator, separate from TCO model in scenarios.json

odometer._projected_basis: Long-term average from 2021-2025 odometer data (~8,200 mi/yr), rounded to 8,000

gas_vehicle.name: Acura RDX
gas_vehicle._note: 24 MPG = EPA FWD combined; use 23 MPG if SH-AWD

ev_vehicle.name: BMW iX xDrive50
ev_vehicle._note: 0.39 kWh/mi = EPA rating (39 kWh/100mi). Real-world Edmunds test = 0.32 kWh/mi
